scripts.dev: npm run build && node scripts/dev-server.mjs dist
scripts.preview: npm run build && node scripts/dev-server.mjs dist
scripts.test:form-validation: rm -rf dist-tests && tsc src/form-validation.ts --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --skipLibCheck --outDir dist-tests && node --test test/form-validation.test.mjs
